sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8144" key="a)nekklhsi/astos1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεκ-κλησίαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8144.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not used for assemblies of the people,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θέατρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1866.tlg001:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
